title: 皐月賞の後に・負けてもほのぼの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Completely spent, Meisho Doto collapses on the
turf.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Doto. Is that your impression of a soldier
defeated by exhaustion? You appeared a little
wilted during the race.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeeah... I couldn't focus on anything but
running, not even the results...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her loss to T.M. Opera O, Meisho Doto is
able to clear her first hurdle in the Classic Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'd like to give you my thanks. I'm
extremely flawed and clumsy... I thought the
Classics might ruin me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But, at least I can say I got through it without
bothering anyone. This was really a race to
remember.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yes, thank you. Um... but it would be nice to do
something else for the occasion.
choice_data_list: Do you want to take a commemorative picture?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not it... I'm thinking of having some
snacks on a nice patch of grass. The breeze is nice
today.
choice_data_list: You want to go on a trip?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gyah! No, that's not what I meant!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
choice_data_list: It's fine, but we can't stay out too long.
It's fine, but we can't stay out too long.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Thank you so much. I'll invite
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As one can imagine, not everyone agrees to come along. Still, we enjoy a little picnic sitting at the center of the track.
